mapper.select: /* wif-das-classificationplan-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getClassificationPlanWaveSeq - 분류계획 Wave Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_classifplan_wa') AS WAVE_SEQ
/* wif-das-classificationplan-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getClassificationPlanOrderSeq - 분류계획 Order Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_classifplan_order') AS ORDER_SEQ
/* wif-das-classificationplan-interface-sql-oracle.xml - getClassificationPlanItemSeq - 분류계획 Item Sequence 조회 SQL */ SELECT nextval('seq_twif_das_classifplan_ic') AS ITEM_SEQ
